topics.title: Review of the Daniel Carver Roast
topics.summary: The studio discusses the mixed reactions to the recent roast, debating whether the performance was a success or a failure based on different listening experiences.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses the success of a recent comedy roast, critiques set design elements like changing wall colors, and hosts a phone interview with a caller who identifies as the girlfriend of a regular listener.

topics.title: Relationship with Gary the Retard
topics.summary: The show features a phone conversation with Jennifer, who describes her long-term relationship and physical intimacy with a man named Gary.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and Medical Consultations
topics.summary: The studio features a debate over media coverage of a lawsuit against CBS followed by an ophthalmologist's medical advice regarding potential infections from sexual fluids.

topics.title: Medical Procedures and Tori Spelling Interview
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on male reproductive health procedures followed by an interview with actress Tori Spelling regarding her personal life and career.

topics.title: Tori Spelling’s Marriage and Divorce
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding Tori Spelling's past marriage, her current relationship, and the details surrounding her divorce from her first husband.

topics.title: Tori Spelling Engagement and New Television Show
topics.summary: The show features Tori Spelling discussing her upcoming marriage, the details of her new scripted series on VH1, and her personal life.

topics.title: CBS Radio Management and David Lee Roth
topics.summary: The studio discusses the poor ratings and management conflicts surrounding David Lee Roth's radio show, while criticizing CBS executives for their handling of the station's programming.

topics.title: Media Industry Gossip and Alien Conspiracy Theories
topics.summary: The studio discusses corporate leadership at CBS, the rise of satellite radio, a prank call involving alien abduction claims, and the recent roast of Bob Levy.

topics.title: Darryl Hammond Impressions and Career
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Darryl Hammond regarding his weight loss journey, his long tenure on Saturday Night Live, and various comedic impressions of figures like Bill Clinton and Jay Leno.

topics.title: SNL Cast Member Experiences and Drug History
topics.summary: The studio features a guest from Saturday Night Live who discusses his history with drug use, past professional conflicts with colleagues, and various comedic sketches.

topics.title: Darryl Hammond and Robotics Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features comedian Darryl Hammond discussing his impressions, upcoming film, and a conversation with an MIT student about robotics and space exploration.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Limerick Contest
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news stories involving Drew Lachey, Kira Knightley, Clint Eastwood, and Mickey Rooney before transitioning to a limerick contest and an update on columnist Art Buckwell.

topics.title: News and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the release of an Iraqi hostage, 9/11 emergency tapes, legal issues involving strip club owners, and celebrity news regarding George Lopez and Britney Spears.
